variable called (PRE_ICL_INPP_COPAY_OS). 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors 
to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from 
reporting Plan Benefit Package information. For those plans that did not report, the value of this 
variable will be blank.
